# AI Consumer Pain-Point Miner & Intelligent Solution Generator
### LLM-Powered Customer Insight & Decision Intelligence System

## 📌 Overview
This project is an AI-powered system that automatically analyzes customer reviews and complaints to extract meaningful business insights. It detects major consumer pain points, identifies root causes, evaluates severity, and generates intelligent solutions and product improvement suggestions.

The system converts raw, unstructured feedback into structured decision intelligence to help organizations improve product quality and prioritize issues efficiently.

---

## 🚀 Key Features

- Automatic Review & Complaint Analysis  
- Pain-Point Detection  
- Category Classification (UI, Performance, Payment, Support, etc.)  
- Severity Detection (Low / Medium / High)  
- Emotion Detection (Angry / Frustrated / Neutral / Happy)  
- Root Cause Analysis  
- Intelligent Solution Generator  
- Product & Feature Improvement Suggestions  
- Priority Scoring System (Frequency × Severity)  
- Insight Summary Generator  
- Interactive Dashboard Visualization  
- LLM-Based Intelligent Reasoning  
- End-to-End AI Pipeline  

---

## 🧠 How It Works

1. The system automatically reads customer reviews and complaints.  
2. Text is preprocessed and cleaned.  
3. Large Language Model analyzes each feedback.  
4. The system extracts:
   - Pain point
   - Category
   - Severity
   - Emotion
   - Root cause
   - Suggested solution  
5. Insight engine identifies:
   - Most common issue
   - Most severe problem
   - Highest priority issue  
6. Dashboard visualizes results and recommendations.

- FastAPI / Backend

- Large Language Model API
- Pandas & NumPy
- Streamlit / Dashboard
- Git & GitHub

## 📊 Example Output

**Input:**  
"Payment failed but money deducted"

**Output:**  
- Category: Payment  
- Severity: High  
- Emotion: Frustration  
- Root Cause: Payment gateway sync issue  
- Solution: Implement real-time payment verification  
- Feature Suggestion: Automated payment recovery system
